_comment: UNVERIFIED access-point feed leads -- same shape as sources.json. The Claude Code sandbox egress allowlist blocks these hosts, so the end-to-end check couldn't run when they were researched (2026-06). Run `python scripts/verify_feed_sources.py --candidates` from a dev machine or CI (open egress), fill in field mappings from the dump, and promote passing entries into sources.json. Leads without a confirmed layer/service URL: TN TWRA boat launch + fishing access datasets (tn-tnmap.opendata.arcgis.com / tnmap.tn.gov ENVIRONMENTAL/TWRA MapServer), KY KDFWR boat ramps (opengisdata.ky.gov item a519a58869e2488a8b073fbdf1717129), NE Game & Parks Public Access Boat Ramps (data-outdoornebraska.opendata.arcgis.com), IN DNR Fishing Access Sites (indianamap.org INMap::fishing-access-sites), OH ODNR boating access (gis-odnr.opendata.arcgis.com), MN DNR Water Access Sites (gisdata.mn.gov / arcgis.dnr.state.mn.us).

sources.label: TPWD River Access and Conservation Areas
sources.note: Leased river-access program sites; some are walk-in angler easements (access may be 'permit'). Passed the CI candidates check 2026-06-09 but the host flaked on a follow-up field dump (meta fetch timed out) -- verify twice before promoting.

sources.label: DNREC Public Fishing Ponds
sources.note: Ponds (polygon?) rather than ramps; loader centroids non-point geometry. Check geometry type when verifying. Passed the CI candidates check 2026-06-09 but the host flaked on a follow-up field dump (meta fetch timed out) -- verify twice before promoting.

sources.label: CDFW Fishing Guide Boating Facilities
sources.note: Endpoint verified PASS (677 pts) but held back: circa-2012 facility inventory that mixes commercial marinas with public launches, so 'access: public' would overclaim. Promote only with a curated owner-type filter.

sources.label: UT DWR Community Fisheries
sources.note: 64 community fishing ponds (2021 vintage), verified PASS; UT has no statewide DWR access layer (boating access is State Parks territory). Promote if pond-level access is wanted.
